Emergency Support Contact Me Office Standards Privacy statement More Menu Contact Me Your local champion for Erdington If you would like to raise a local issue or personal concern, please get in touch using the information below. Phone: 0121 306 4275 Email: [email protected] Write: Office of Paulette Hamilton MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA PLEASE NOTE: Our phone lines are open between 10.00am – 4.00pm on Monday to Friday – if you call us outside these times please leave a voicemail with your name , address , and contact number , and a member of the team will return your call as soon as possible. Paulette Hamilton Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of The Labour Party, both at 20 Rushworth Street, SE1 0SS. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
